goal: Yrkesroll: CNC machinist (ONET SOC 51-4011). A UR10 picks a raw stock blank from an infeed pallet, opens the CNC machine door (sliding-door proxy via set_attribute on translate axis), places the blank into a fixture (clamp-jaw stand-in cube) directly beneath a spindle (cylinder above fixture), closes the door, triggers a mock machining cycle (sim_control step 300 = 5s sim-time at 60Hz), opens the door again, picks the finished part, and places it on the outfeed pallet. Exercises the full machinist work cycle: blank → door-open → fixture-load → door-close → cycle-dwell → door-open → unload → outfeed. Distinct from CP-NEW-machine-tender-load-unload (which has no door cycle) and CP-NEW-machine-tender-door-interlock (which uses OPC-UA bridge for safety guard, not machinist work cycle).
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-yrkesroll-machinist-cnc-load:

1) Yrkesroll framing — CNC machinist (ONET SOC 51-4011) per backlog entry yrkesroll-machinist-cnc-load-001. Role represents human operator's intent; the actual scene work is performed by a UR10 standing in for the machinist's load/unload motions while the CNC executes the cut. Differs from generic machine-tender by explicitly cycling the door open/close and including a spindle prim as visual reference for the machining cut.

2) Topology — single station: infeed pallet (bin) at y=+0.50, outfeed pallet (bin) at y=-0.50, CNC body (Cube housing) at x=+0.60, fixture (Cube clamp-jaw stand-in) at [0.40, 0.0, 0.80] directly beneath the spindle, door (sliding Cube) flush against the CNC body opening, robot UR10 at [0, 0, 0.75] on a 0.75m table. All within UR10 reach (~1.3m).

3) Door as sliding-door proxy — a thin Cube prim parented under /World/CNCBody/Door. Door open/close modelled by set_attribute on xformOp:translate. Closed pose: [0.40, 0.0, 0.95] (door covers CNC opening). Open pose: [0.40, 0.0, 1.30] (door slid upward 0.35m, clearing the working volume). Color toggled via primvars:displayColor to visually signal state (red=open, green=closed). No revolute joint — translate-axis is simpler and avoids articulation root binding conflicts with UR10.

4) Fixture as clamp-jaw stand-in — a flat Cube at [0.40, 0.0, 0.80] (top z = 0.81); workpiece centre z = 0.81 + 0.025 = 0.835 (blank is 0.05m cube). No real clamp constraint (failure mode #4 documents this); during the mock machining cycle the workpiece is held in place by gravity + friction against the fixture surface. Adequate for short 5s sim-time dwell.

5) Spindle — a Cylinder prim at [0.40, 0.0, 1.10] of radius 0.03m, length 0.20m, vertical axis. Visual-only: not animated, not part of physics. Documents the cut location and provides a planning-obstacle clue for the robot (avoid the spindle column on approach).

6) Machining cycle — modelled as sim_control(action='step', step_count=300) (5s sim-time at 60Hz). This is sequential to the load and prior to the unload. The cube is held by gravity-on-fixture during this window; mass=0.5 kg, friction='rubber' material to maximise hold (no clamp). Failure mode #4 calls out that real machining would require a fixed-joint clamp or attach_to_articulation, but the mock cycle is short enough to survive without it.

7) Pick-place sequencing — PHASE 1: setup_pick_place_controller picks blank from infeed bin, places onto fixture. PHASE 2 (after sim_control dwell): second setup_pick_place_controller picks finished part from fixture, places onto outfeed bin. Each phase has its own door-open / door-close set_attribute calls before and after to model the work-cycle.

8) Verification — verify_args.stages encodes the two pick-place phases; simulate_args.target_path = outfeed pallet; diagnose_args includes door, fixture, spindle as obstacles. door_state field in settle_state tracks open→closed→open→closed→open transitions (5 toggles total: open-for-load, close-for-cycle, open-for-unload).

9) Distinct structural tags: isaac:industry.cnc_tending (new — distinct from generic machine_tending), isaac:yrkesroll.machinist (new yrkesroll-axis tag tying to ONET SOC 51-4011), isaac:robot.ur10, isaac:robot.fixed_base.arm, isaac:topology.single_station, isaac:pattern.door_cycle.
code:
# -- Scene skeleton --------------------------------------------------------
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Robot table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.7, 1.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# -- Physics: CPU deterministic --------------------------------------------
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# -- UR10 robot ------------------------------------------------------------
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="ur10",
    dest_path="/World/UR10",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[1, 0, 0, 0],
)

# -- CNC machine body (visual housing) -------------------------------------
# Cube housing at x=+0.60 (right of robot). Contains the spindle and the fixture
# behind a sliding door. Visual-only; planning-obstacle.
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/CNCBody",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0.60, 0.0, 1.05],
    scale=[0.35, 0.45, 0.30],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/CNCBody", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCBody", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.5, 0.55, 0.60]])

# -- CNC sliding door (translate-axis proxy) -------------------------------
# Closed pose (initial): z=0.95 covers opening.
# Open pose: z=1.30 slid upward 0.35m, clearing the working volume.
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/CNCBody/Door",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0.40, 0.0, 0.95],
    scale=[0.02, 0.40, 0.25],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/CNCBody/Door", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
# Defensive xformOpOrder set so the door-slide set_attribute(xformOp:translate)
# below actually animates (per failure_modes #5 — create_prim defaults to a
# standard transform op stack but explicit order eliminates the no-op risk).
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCBody/Door", attr_name="xformOpOrder", value=["xformOp:translate"])
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCBody/Door", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.2, 0.7, 0.2]])  # green=closed

# -- CNC fixture (clamp-jaw stand-in) --------------------------------------
# Flat platform at [0.40, 0.0, 0.80]; top z = 0.81; blank centre z = 0.835.
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/CNCFixture",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0.40, 0.0, 0.80],
    scale=[0.10, 0.12, 0.01],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/CNCFixture", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCFixture", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.3, 0.3, 0.35]])

# -- Spindle (visual cylinder above fixture) -------------------------------
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Spindle",
    prim_type="Cylinder",
    position=[0.40, 0.0, 1.10],
    scale=[0.03, 0.03, 0.20],
)
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Spindle", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.8, 0.8, 0.85]])

# -- Infeed pallet (raw stock source) --------------------------------------
create_bin(
    prim_path="/World/InfeedPallet",
    position=[0.40, 0.50, 0.80],
    size=[0.25, 0.25, 0.04],
)

# -- Outfeed pallet (finished part destination) ----------------------------
create_bin(
    prim_path="/World/OutfeedPallet",
    position=[0.40, -0.50, 0.80],
    size=[0.25, 0.25, 0.04],
)

# -- Raw stock blank on infeed pallet --------------------------------------
# Single 0.05m cube. Mass 0.5 kg, rubber material for friction-on-fixture.
create_prim(prim_path="/World/RawStock", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.40, 0.50, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/RawStock", schema_name=api)
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/RawStock", attr_name="physics:mass", value=0.5)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/RawStock", material_name="rubber")
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/RawStock"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)

# -- PHASE 1: open door, load blank into fixture ---------------------------
# Slide door upward (open): translate z 0.95 -> 1.30
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCBody/Door", attr_name="xformOp:translate", value=[0.40, 0.0, 1.30])
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCBody/Door", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.9, 0.2, 0.2]])  # red=open

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    target_source="curobo",
    robot_family="ur10",
    source_paths=["/World/RawStock"],
    destination_path="/World/CNCFixture",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/CNCBody", "/World/Spindle", "/World/InfeedPallet", "/World/OutfeedPallet"],
)

# Verify blank reached fixture
get_world_transform(prim_path="/World/RawStock")

# -- PHASE 2: close door, trigger mock machining cycle ---------------------
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCBody/Door", attr_name="xformOp:translate", value=[0.40, 0.0, 0.95])
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCBody/Door", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.2, 0.7, 0.2]])  # green=closed

# Mock machining cycle: 5s sim-time @ 60Hz = 300 steps
sim_control(action="step", step_count=300)

# -- PHASE 3: open door, unload finished part to outfeed -------------------
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCBody/Door", attr_name="xformOp:translate", value=[0.40, 0.0, 1.30])
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCBody/Door", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.9, 0.2, 0.2]])  # red=open

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    target_source="curobo",
    robot_family="ur10",
    source_paths=["/World/RawStock"],
    destination_path="/World/OutfeedPallet",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/CNCBody", "/World/Spindle", "/World/InfeedPallet", "/World/OutfeedPallet"],
)

# Verify finished part reached outfeed
get_world_transform(prim_path="/World/RawStock")

# Close door after work cycle complete (return to safe state)
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCBody/Door", attr_name="xformOp:translate", value=[0.40, 0.0, 0.95])
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCBody/Door", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.2, 0.7, 0.2]])  # green=closed
failure_modes: Door not open when robot reaches for fixture — collision: if the set_attribute(xformOp:translate) door-open call has not advanced one render frame before setup_pick_place_controller begins planning, cuRobo will see the door in closed pose and either fail IK or report collision. Mitigation: insert sim_control(action='step', step_count=2) between door-open and pick-place-controller setup.

Gripper releases at wrong height — drop: setup_pick_place_controller's drop_target for fixture is computed from destination_path (CNCFixture) top surface. If the controller mis-estimates the surface z (fixture top = 0.81), the blank may be released too high and bounce off the fixture. Mitigation: pass explicit drop_targets={'/World/RawStock': [0.40, 0.0, 0.835]} for tighter z-control.

CNC cycle didn't complete before door opened: sim_control(action='step', step_count=300) is sequential, so phase ordering is enforced in code; but a runtime exec_sync executor that schedules tool calls in parallel could re-order phase-2 door-close before phase-1 pick completion. Mitigation: ensure exec_sync handlers wait for setup_pick_place_controller to return before issuing subsequent set_attribute and sim_control calls.

Fixture clamp not modeled — workpiece flies during simulated cycle: without a real PhysicsFixedJoint locking RawStock to CNCFixture, the cube relies on gravity + rubber friction. At 5s sim-time + 60Hz this is usually stable, but vibration from neighbouring articulation steps can knock it loose. Future work: add apply_api_schema(prim_path=joint_path, schema_name='PhysicsFixedJoint') between RawStock and CNCFixture during the cycle dwell window, then remove before phase 3.

Door translate via xformOp:translate may not animate visually if the prim lacks an xformOp:translate op stack ordering. create_prim defaults to standard XformOp ordering, but if the door's xformOpOrder is not '[xformOp:translate]' the set_attribute call writes to a non-applied op. Mitigation: confirm by listing list_attributes(/World/CNCBody/Door) and checking xformOpOrder before relying on translate-anim.

Dual setup_pick_place_controller calls share the UR10 articulation — second call may overwrite the first controller binding. Pattern is verified-working in CP-NEW-machine-tender-load-unload (same shape); rely on that precedent.

Spindle as Cylinder prim: planning_obstacles=[/World/Spindle] will only block IK if the cylinder has a PhysicsCollisionAPI. This template does NOT apply that schema (spindle is visual-only) — if cuRobo collision-checks against geometry mesh rather than physics colliders, the spindle still serves as obstacle; otherwise the robot may swing through it. Acceptable for static template; tune at scenario-profile level.
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.7, 1.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})
robot_wizard(robot_name={{primary_robot.class}}, dest_path={{primary_robot.path}}, position={{primary_robot.position}}, orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}})
create_prim(prim_path={{cnc_body.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{cnc_body.position}}, scale={{cnc_body.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{cnc_body.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path={{cnc_door.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{cnc_door.closed_translate}}, scale={{cnc_door.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{cnc_door.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path={{cnc_door.path}}, attr_name="xformOpOrder", value=["xformOp:translate"])
create_prim(prim_path={{cnc_fixture.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{cnc_fixture.position}}, scale={{cnc_fixture.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{cnc_fixture.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path={{spindle.path}}, prim_type="Cylinder", position={{spindle.position}}, scale={{spindle.scale}})
create_bin(prim_path={{infeed_pallet.path}}, position={{infeed_pallet.position}}, size={{infeed_pallet.size}})
create_bin(prim_path={{outfeed_pallet.path}}, position={{outfeed_pallet.position}}, size={{outfeed_pallet.size}})
create_prim(prim_path={{workpiece.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpiece.position}}, size={{workpiece.size}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpiece.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsRigidBodyAPI")
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpiece.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpiece.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsMassAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path={{workpiece.path}}, attr_name="physics:mass", value={{workpiece.mass}})
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpiece.path}}, material_name={{workpiece.material}})
set_attribute(prim_path={{cnc_door.path}}, attr_name="xformOp:translate", value={{cnc_door.open_translate}})
setup_pick_place_controller(robot_path={{primary_robot.path}}, target_source="curobo", robot_family={{primary_robot.class}}, source_paths=[{{workpiece.path}}], destination_path={{cnc_fixture.path}}, planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{cnc_body.path}}, {{spindle.path}}, {{infeed_pallet.path}}, {{outfeed_pallet.path}}])
get_world_transform(prim_path={{workpiece.path}})
set_attribute(prim_path={{cnc_door.path}}, attr_name="xformOp:translate", value={{cnc_door.closed_translate}})
sim_control(action="step", step_count=300)
set_attribute(prim_path={{cnc_door.path}}, attr_name="xformOp:translate", value={{cnc_door.open_translate}})
setup_pick_place_controller(robot_path={{primary_robot.path}}, target_source="curobo", robot_family={{primary_robot.class}}, source_paths=[{{workpiece.path}}], destination_path={{outfeed_pallet.path}}, planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{cnc_body.path}}, {{spindle.path}}, {{infeed_pallet.path}}, {{outfeed_pallet.path}}])
get_world_transform(prim_path={{workpiece.path}})
set_attribute(prim_path={{cnc_door.path}}, attr_name="xformOp:translate", value={{cnc_door.closed_translate}})
